specs: Task tracker CLI demonstrating hex architecture: domain (pure types + status transitions), ports (TaskStore trait), adapters (InMemoryTaskStore), composition root. Every layer has tests.

tasks.name: Domain types + tests
tasks.description: Write src/domain/mod.rs: TaskId(String), Status enum {Todo,InProgress,Done,Cancelled} with can_transition_to(), Priority enum {Low,Medium,High,Critical} with Ord, Task struct {id,title,status,priority} with transition() that validates, DomainError enum. Include 8+ #[cfg(test)] tests for transitions. ZERO external deps.

tasks.name: Port traits
tasks.description: Write src/ports/mod.rs: trait TaskStore {save,find,find_mut,list,remove}, enum Command {Add,List,Start,Done,Cancel,Remove}, fn parse_args. Import only from crate::domain.

tasks.name: InMemoryTaskStore + tests
tasks.description: Write src/adapters/mod.rs: InMemoryTaskStore implementing TaskStore with HashMap. Include 5+ tests. Import only from crate::domain and crate::ports.

phases.name: composition
phases.description: Composition root — wires adapters to ports

tasks.name: Composition root + main
tasks.description: Write src/main.rs: mod domain; mod ports; mod adapters; use ports::{TaskStore,Command,parse_args}; use adapters::InMemoryTaskStore; fn main() parses args, creates store, executes command, prints result.
